headline: Eco Creations – Nuwaraeliya wins Best Eco-Friendly Hotel
standfirst: Eco Creations – Nuwaraeliya is recognised in the Global Business Excellence Awards previous winners archive for Best Eco-Friendly Hotel, with source-backed context prepared for readers reviewing the award record.

content.text: Eco Creations – Nuwaraeliya and the award record

Eco Creations – Nuwaraeliya is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Best Eco-Friendly Hotel. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Eco Creations – Nuwaraeliya, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

Booking and review sources identify Eco Creations Nuwaraeliya as an accommodation property or guesthouse. The GBE source supports the award claim. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
Why the Best Eco-Friendly Hotel record matters

The Best Eco-Friendly Hotel recognition places Eco Creations – Nuwaraeliya in the GBE previous winners archive for 2025. For a prospective customer, partner, journalist, or award researcher, the practical value of this page is a clean public record: who received the award, what the award was called, and which source trail was reviewed before publication.
Recipient profile reviewed against available source notes.

Source notes reviewed for this page include gbeaward.com, booking.com, tripadvisor.com, facebook.com. These references are used to confirm identity, business activity, programme identity, or award context. Where a source is a social profile, directory listing, booking platform, or press article rather than a recipient-owned website, the article keeps the claim narrow and avoids treating that source as proof of wider performance.
For the Best Eco-Friendly Hotel page, that source trail anchors the story to the exact award record instead of a broad promotional profile.

No clear standalone official site found; avoid detailed operational claims beyond booking/profile sources. This limitation matters because the site should not turn a winner listing into inflated SEO copy. It should help people discover the award record while keeping every visible claim defensible.
The Best Eco-Friendly Hotel page therefore stays careful, useful, and defensible for readers checking the public record.

Eco Creations – Nuwaraeliya's winner page will continue to be updated when stronger official sources, rights-cleared media, recipient statements, or ceremony materials are available. Until then, this page prioritises clarity, the official award wording, and source-backed context over generic promotional language.
Future updates to the Best Eco-Friendly Hotel page can add deeper recipient context when stronger evidence is available.
